ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tenant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contact purposes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the tenant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., packet capture, system log) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tenant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the data source configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the network device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of network device (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the network device */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tenant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "snmp_community" TEXT /* SNMP community string for device management */,
  "last_contact" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last successful contact with the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_devices_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_captures" (
  "capture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet capture */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network device */,
  "packet_data" TEXT /* Packet capture data */,
  "capture_time" TEXT /* Time when the packet was captured */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tenant */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet capture in bytes */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used in the packet capture */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the packet */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the packet */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Source port of the packet */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port of the packet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the packet capture was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_captures_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_captures_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_captures_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network device */,
  "log_data" TEXT /* System log data */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the log was generated */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tenant */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., application, system) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network traffic */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network device */,
  "traffic_data" TEXT /* Network traffic data */,
  "traffic_time" TEXT /* Time when the traffic was recorded */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tenant */,
  "traffic_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic (e.g., HTTP, FTP) */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the traffic */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the traffic */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Source port of the traffic */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port of the traffic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the traffic was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network administrator, security analyst) */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tenant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "is_active" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tenant */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)
